name: Mata Hari
overview: A sex icon becomes a spy during one of the most important wars of the 20th century. To survive, Margaret becomes an exotic dancer after her husband leaves her. When the world stands on the edge of WWI, she becomes Mata Hari, a spy with unprecedented access to the European elite.

trailers.title: Mata Hari Trailer- MIPCOM 2016 World Premiere Screening
